parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT * FROM service-desk-472314.coherent_voice_dataset.adsim_products_programming_displayLocation ORDER BY ITEMS_ID DESC;

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.adsim_products_programming_displaylocation (
  PRODUCT_ID,
  PROGRAMMING_ID,
  ITEMS_ID,
  DISPLAYLOCATION_ID,
  DISPLAYLOCATION_NAME,
  DISPLAYLOCATION_INITIALS
) VALUES (
  {{ $json["PRODUCT_ID"] && $json["PRODUCT_ID"] !== "" && !isNaN($json["PRODUCT_ID"]) ? parseInt($json["PRODUCT_ID"]) : 0 }},
  
  {{ $json["PROGRAMMING_ID"] && $json["PROGRAMMING_ID"] !== "" && !isNaN($json["PROGRAMMING_ID"]) ? parseInt($json["PROGRAMMING_ID"]) : 0 }},
  
  {{ $json["ITEMS_ID"] && $json["ITEMS_ID"] !== "" && !isNaN($json["ITEMS_ID"]) ? parseInt($json["ITEMS_ID"]) : 0 }},
  
  {{ $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_ID"] && $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_ID"] !== "" && !isNaN($json["DISPLAYLOCATION_ID"]) ? parseInt($json["DISPLAYLOCATION_ID"]) : 0 }},
  
  '{{ $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_NAME"] && $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_NAME"] !== "" ? $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_NAME"].replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}',
  
  '{{ $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_INITIALS"] && $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_INITIALS"] !== "" ? $json["DISPLAYLOCATION_INITIALS"].replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}'
);


DELETE FROM public.adsim_products_programming_displaylocation a
USING public.adsim_products_programming_displaylocation b
WHERE a.ctid < b.ctid
  AND a.ITEMS_ID = b.ITEMS_ID
  AND a.PROGRAMMING_ID = b.PROGRAMMING_ID
  AND a.PRODUCT_ID = b.PRODUCT_ID;
